programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.

programme.title: Jeena Isi Ka Naam Hai
programme.desc: Alia, an aspiring writer, marries a brutal and abusive prince to put an end to her family's misery. She runs away from him and starts a new life when he orders someone to kill their unborn girl child.

programme.title: Raajneeti
programme.desc: Samar, the son of a political family, has chosen to go to the USA to live with his girlfriend. However, the death of his father makes him put his plans on hold and enter the dirty world of politics.

programme.title: Welcome
programme.desc: Two thugs meet Rajiv, who belongs to a respectable family, and want to fix their sister's wedding with him. However, when Rajiv's uncle refuses to the match, a series of hilarious situations occur.

programme.title: Life in a ... Metro
programme.desc: The lives of nine people living and working in the city of Mumbai change drastically when their fates intertwine with each other. However, they are determined to rise above their emotions.

programme.title: Jug Jugg Jeeyo
programme.desc: A family wedding becomes a turning point for two couples from different generations to confront their misunderstandings, hidden affairs, and doubts that test their love and relationships.

programme.title: Wake Up Sid
programme.desc: The life of a lazy and aimless young man takes an interesting turn, blossoming into an individual who discovers his potential after meeting an aspiring writer.

programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

programme.title: Rang de Basanti
programme.desc: When Sue selects a few students to portray various Indian freedom fighters in her film, she unwittingly awakens their patriotism. The emotional and mental process turns them into rebels for a cause.

programme.title: De De Pyaar De
programme.desc: When Ashish falls in love with Ayesha, a woman almost half his age, he introduces her to his ex-wife and children. However, their nonacceptance threatens to ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Salaam E Ishq: A Tribute to Love
programme.desc: According to a famous author, love is not always easy, but it is worth the struggle. Exemplifying this sentiment, six couples burn some bridges and bridge some distances to find their happiness.
